name: ACADIA REALTY TRUST
business: ACADIA REALTY TRUST is a real estate investment trust that owns and operates a portfolio of retail properties, including street retail and suburban shopping centers, located in supply-constrained, high-barrier-to-entry markets. It leases space to national and local retailers under long-term leases.

exposures.sentence: retailers at our properties (both in our REIT Portfolio and in the portfolios of the Investment Management portfolio) face increasing competition from outlet malls, discount shopping clubs, e-commerce, direct mail, and telemarketing
